title: Injustice: Gods Among Us Ultimate Edition

notes: Installs and loads fine. Menus are smooth. In matches it is playable but in levels with a lot of things going on in the background it gets choppy and hard to play (Hall of justice was particularly laggy). Lowering graphics settings just made it worse.
